string 1: This is a strange place you've found yourselves in...

Is it possible that the natural laws of this world are beginning
to collapse...? Is this the result? Or, perhaps, a sign of things to
come...?
This is like a scene from primitive times...

Chaos itself is Parallelmon's territory... I imagine they seek to
expand it even further.

Seizing a powerful being from another dimension would surely
become a distortion in and of itself.

The mere act of bringing together two beings who were never
destined to meet can cause a breakdown in reason. Which is
music to Parallelmon's ears, I would imagine...

It is possible that in some other future where order has
collapsed, scenes such as this litter the landscape.

Existence itself becomes a mere speck of space-time, and its
bare framework is exposed.
